methodology.gitHistory: git log -S sousId per pool on pools.tsx

concurrencyAnalysis.question: Were 10-15 pools visible at once?
concurrencyAnalysis.note: Permanent surfaces counted as Auto MARCO + Manual MARCO (2). Flexible MARCO conditional not included.
concurrencyAnalysis.caveat: Peak is theoretical overlap of on-chain windows; actual UI may have listed fewer if config added pools late.

melegaEraIntersection.note: Pools in config AND on-chain open at same date
